# Meta Campaign — Brambleton Plumbing
## Location: Brambleton, VA
## Generated by: Community Trust Creative Agent

## Ad Variation 1
**Hook:** Pipe burst at midnight? We're already on the way.
**Body:** Brambleton Plumbing has answered emergency calls in this neighborhood for 15 years — day, night, weekends, and holidays. No hold music. No waiting until Monday. Just fast, reliable plumbing when it matters most.
**CTA:** Call us now — 24/7 emergency response
**Image Prompt:** A split-scene image: left side shows a stressed homeowner staring at a burst pipe under a sink at night, right side shows a Brambleton Plumbing technician arriving at a well-lit front door with tools in hand and a reassuring expression. Warm, trustworthy lighting on the technician side.

---

## Ad Variation 2
**Hook:** 15 years fixing Brambleton homes. We know your neighborhood.
**Body:** From Brambleton Town Center to the back streets of Arcola, we've repaired pipes and installed water heaters for families just like yours. Local means we're close, responsive, and accountable — not a 1-800 number.
**CTA:** Schedule your service today
**Image Prompt:** A friendly uniformed plumber shaking hands with a homeowner on the front porch of a typical Brambleton-style brick-front home on a sunny day. A branded work van is visible in the driveway. The mood is warm, professional, and community-rooted.

---

## Ad Variation 3
**Hook:** Your water heater won't warn you. We will.
**Body:** Most water heaters fail without warning — and always at the worst time. Brambleton Plumbing installs, repairs, and replaces water heaters fast, with upfront pricing and zero surprises. Trusted by homeowners in Brambleton and surrounding Loudoun County since 2009.
**CTA:** Get a free estimate — no obligation
**Image Prompt:** A clean, modern utility room with a newly installed water heater gleaming under good lighting. A technician in a branded uniform stands beside it with a clipboard, smiling confidently at the camera. The image communicates competence, cleanliness, and reliability.
